welcome: Hi! I'm Bubbles the octopus! Let's rescue ocean animals and learn how AI helps protect the sea!
menu_subtitle: Collect all tools and save the ocean!
q1_start: First, let's learn about ocean habitats! Every sea creature has a home. Let's figure out where they belong!
q1_instruction: Is this creature from the coral reef, the deep sea, the shoreline, the arctic, or the open ocean? Tap to label each one!
q1_done: Awesome! You taught the AI about ocean habitats! Let's see how well it learned.
q1_learned: You learned that AI needs labeled data to understand the world, just like you learned where each animal lives!
t_reef_clownfish_y: Yes! Clownfish live in coral reefs, hiding in anemones!
t_reef_clownfish_n: Actually, clownfish live in coral reefs! They hide in sea anemones.
t_deep_squid_y: Right! Giant squid live deep in the ocean where it's very dark!
t_deep_squid_n: Oops! Giant squid live in the deep sea, way down where it's dark!
t_shore_crab_y: Correct! Hermit crabs live along the shoreline in tide pools!
t_shore_crab_n: Actually, hermit crabs live on the shoreline in tide pools!
t_arctic_seal_y: Yes! Harp seals live in freezing arctic waters!
t_arctic_seal_n: Oops! Harp seals live in the arctic where it's super cold!
t_open_dolphin_y: Right! Dolphins swim through the open ocean!
t_open_dolphin_n: Actually, dolphins live in the open ocean, swimming far and wide!
t_reef_turtle_y: Yes! Sea turtles love coral reefs!
t_reef_turtle_n: Oops! Sea turtles hang out around coral reefs!
t_deep_angler_y: Correct! Anglerfish live in the deep sea and glow in the dark!
t_deep_angler_n: Actually, anglerfish live deep in the ocean where they use their light to hunt!
t_shore_starfish_y: Yes! Starfish live in tide pools along the shore!
t_shore_starfish_n: Oops! Starfish live on the shoreline in tide pools!
t_arctic_whale_y: Right! Beluga whales live in cold arctic waters!
t_arctic_whale_n: Actually, beluga whales live in the arctic where it's freezing!
t_open_shark_y: Correct! Great white sharks roam the open ocean!
t_open_shark_n: Oops! Great white sharks swim through the open ocean!
correct: Great job! You got it right!
summary: Let's look at what the AI learned from your labels!
summary_bias: Hmm, most of your data is about one habitat. The AI might not know the others very well!
summary_learned: You learned that AI can be biased if it doesn't get enough examples of everything!
q3_start: Now let's test the AI! It will try to sort animals using what you taught it. Watch carefully!
q3_done: The AI did pretty well! Your training data really helped!
q3_retrain: The AI needs more training. Let's go back and teach it more!
q3_learned: You learned that testing AI is important. If it makes mistakes, we need to give it more data!
q4_start: Time for the rescue mission! Pollution is threatening ocean animals. The AI will spot dangers, but sometimes it's wrong. You decide when to act!
q4_save: Great call! You saved that animal!
q4_crash: Oh no! The pollution got through!
q4_ai_right: The AI handled that one correctly!
q4_false_alarm: That was actually safe. The AI got confused!
q4_done: Mission complete! You and the AI make a great team!
q4_learned: You learned that humans and AI work best together. AI spots things fast, but humans make the final call!
q5_start: Final mission! Guide the rescue boat across the ocean to save all the animals!
q5_launch: Setting sail! The AI is navigating using everything you taught it!
q5_done: You did it! All animals are safe! The ocean is protected!
q5_learned: You learned that AI can help protect nature, but it needs good training data from people like you!
all_done: Congratulations! You completed the Ocean Rescue Quest! You're a real ocean scientist!
